team.date_founded: Founded on Makemake, named for a creator-deity, by settlers who prized making something from nothing.
team.number_of_fans: Around 4 million faithful, devoted to the club's creative gospel.
team.badge: An open hand cupping a newborn star, rays spreading outward.
team.home_kit: Warm terracotta and cream with a creation-ray motif.
team.third_kit: Deep earth-red with a single newborn star.
team.history: Makemake are the Kuiper's artists — a possession side famed for conjuring chances from nothing on a shoestring budget. Where others see a dead end, the Makers thread a pass; their creative, patient football is a small miracle at the edge of the system.
team.club_culture: Creative, devout, and resourceful. The Makers believe football is an act of creation.
team.political_leaning: Kuiper-communalist — a co-operative club that shares everything it has.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for creative football far beyond their means
legends: Genesis Vail — the playmaker who made chances appear from thin vacuum
achievements: Most chances created per budget credit in the Kuiper

stadium.date_built: A frontier ground built by the colony's own hands.
stadium.sponsors: Backed communally by the Makemake settlement.
stadium.pitch_size: Generously wide to let the possession game breathe.
stadium.pitch_type: Basic frontier synthetic turf, lovingly maintained.
stadium.bio: The Cradle is a humble, hand-built ground where the small crowd worships the perfect pass. Visitors underestimate the Makers' creativity at their peril.

training_facility.date_built: A basic academy the community treasures.
training_facility.bio: The Creation Academy drills technique, vision, and youth above all — the Makers grow their own creators, since they cannot afford to buy them.

manager.appearance: Calm and devout, watches her side weave patterns with a quiet smile.
manager.bio: Genesis Solano is a possession purist who conjures creative, patient football from a tiny budget. Her Makers keep the ball and craft chances from nothing — an act of faith and skill in equal measure.
manager.playing_history: A playmaker who orchestrated games at small clubs.
manager.playing_philosophy: Keep the ball and create. With patience and craft, something always appears.
manager.culture: A believer in creation over expenditure.
achievements: Built the Kuiper's most creative side on the smallest budget

managing_staff.appearance: Warm and patient, happiest among the academy youngsters.
managing_staff.bio: Origin Okonjo runs the youth development that keeps the cash-strapped Makers stocked with home-grown creators.
managing_staff.playing_history: A creative midfielder turned youth coach.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: If you cannot buy creators, you must grow them.
achievements: Built a youth pipeline that sustains the senior side

players.appearance: Calm and assured, comfortable starting the build-up.
players.bio: Ancient Vasquez is the balanced keeper trusted to begin every patient Makers move.
achievements: Highest passing accuracy by a keeper in the Kuiper

players.appearance: Tireless and willing, an overlapping full-back.
players.bio: Rune Cruz is the workhorse full-back who joins the patient build-up without breaking its rhythm.

players.appearance: Selfless and smooth, a passing defender.
players.bio: Mystic Okafor is the team-first defender comfortable keeping the ball under pressure.
achievements: Most progressive passes by a defender

players.appearance: Combative and firm, the rare edge.
players.bio: Oracle Sato is the aggressive defender who wins the ball back so the artists can create.

players.appearance: Balanced and calm, the composed base.
players.bio: Enigma Lee is the composed centre-back who keeps the Makers solid while they create.
Totem Kim is the creative heart who sets the rhythm and conjures the Makers' chances.
achievements: Most chances created in the Kuiper

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the tireless link.
players.bio: Ritual Mori is the team-first midfielder who keeps the possession flowing.
achievements: Most passes completed in the side

players.bio: Omen Osei is the composed pivot who keeps the Makers circulating the ball.
achievements: Highest pass volume in the side

players.appearance: Patient and predatory, waits for the perfect ball.
players.bio: Deity Rivera is the selfish finisher who lives off the chances the patient build-up conjures.
achievements: Best conversion rate in the side

players.appearance: Direct and willing, the cutting edge.
players.bio: Idol Chen is the aggressive forward who stretches defences so the creation has space.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, a second finisher.
players.bio: Shrine Patel is the selfish forward who turns the Makers' craft into goals.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Altar Beck is the cautious veteran second keeper, comfortable on the ball and dependable.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Votive Park is the team-first deputy who keeps the build-up intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Icon Torres is the promising young defender absorbing the Makers' patient principles.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Rite Tanaka is the creative deputy and the Makers' brightest young hope.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Effigy Brennan is the eager young finisher pushing for a place among the Makers.
